title: Irradiator
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Irradiators''' were small round lighting devices that emitted bands of energy to kill micro-organisms on [[Starship/Legends|starships]] to prevent infection of passengers and crew. They also doubled as interior lighting and were commonly found in most [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]] and many ships, including the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{Mo}}
